channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 600,000 — **Newly Renovated 6-Bedroom Home In Rolf Valley** (Rolf Valley, Harare North)
item.description: USD 600,000 — Rolf Valley, Harare North. 6 beds, 4 baths. **Newly Renovated 6-Bedroom Home In Rolf Valley**. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
